project_type: React + TypeScript + Vite board game app with Zustand state management
build_system: Vite with TypeScript compilation (tsc -b && vite build)
test_framework: No test framework found (no test files)
verification_instructions: Run npx tsc --noEmit for type checking and npm run build for full build verification
key_patterns: Translation system: i18n/en.ts and i18n/es.ts export const objects typed as TranslationKey. useT() hook returns a t(key, params?) function. Card effects use getCardEffectKey(cardId) from utils/cardTranslations.ts. Icons are in src/components/Icons.tsx as React SVG components (BushiIcon, CoinIcon, HonorIcon, VPIcon, ShintoIcon). The t() function currently returns plain strings. To render icons inline, we need a new utility that parses token syntax like {vp}3 and returns React elements (JSX).
directory_structure: src/components/ (React components), src/i18n/ (en.ts, es.ts, index.ts translations), src/utils/ (gameLogic.ts, cardTranslations.ts, figureImages.ts), src/store/ (Zustand store), src/types/ (TypeScript types)
